description: Hardcoding and Configuration: Detect hardcoded values, secrets, and brittle assumptions.

fixtures.notes: Hardcodes the Stripe API base URL as a string literal instead of reading it from configuration.
Hardcodes a JDBC connection string with username and password directly in source code.
Reads the API URL from an environment variable with a safe localhost default for local development.
All external service URLs are injected via application.properties and Spring @Value annotation.
Hardcodes the production hostname alongside port 443 — the hostname makes this a brittle production assumption.
